_doc: Voice registry for step4_tts.py — maps character SLOTS to TTS voices across providers. RESOLVE ORDER per (language, slot): language_overrides[language][slot] if present, else slots[slot]; the provider's entry in `providers` supplies the default model + settings (a slot may override model/settings inline). SLOTS: miss_nova (the AI teacher Miss Nova — ONE consistent warm brand voice everywhere), female_lead, male_lead, female_secondary, male_secondary, narrator. A character maps to a slot at runtime: Miss Nova -> miss_nova; a narrator/voiceover line -> narrator; otherwise inferred gender + first-of-that-gender -> *_lead, the rest -> *_secondary. These are a SEED (operator swaps voice_ids to taste): the `slots` defaults use ElevenLabs multilingual voices (one voice works across all languages); `language_overrides` route specific languages to Cartesia's native voices. Re-list any time: `python3.13 facebook/scripts/step4_tts.py --list-voices --provider elevenlabs|cartesia [--language Hindi]`.

miss_nova._voice: Anjali — warm, cheerful & clear (hi/F): the brand AI teacher, consistent across languages

female_lead._voice: Arushi — Hinglish speaker (hi/F), great for code-mix
